---
name: Design Improvement
about: Suggest design improvements or report design issues
title: ''
labels: design
assignees: ''

---

## Design Improvement

**What design aspect would you like to improve?**

**Where is this design element located?**
- [ ] Header
- [ ] Navigation
- [ ] Content sections
- [ ] Footer
- [ ] Mobile layout
- [ ] Forms
- [ ] Buttons
- [ ] Typography
- [ ] Color scheme
- [ ] Icons
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**What specific improvements would you like to see?**

**Current design issue (if any)**
Describe any current design problems or inconsistencies.

**Proposed solution**
If you have ideas for how to improve the design, please describe them.

**Design principles**
What design principles should guide this improvement?
- [ ] Usability
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Consistency
- [ ] Modern aesthetics
- [ ] Brand alignment
- [ ] User experience
- [ ] Visual hierarchy
- [ ] Responsive design
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Target audience**
Who is this design improvement for?
- [ ] General users
- [ ] Mobile users
- [ ] Accessibility users
- [ ] Specific demographics
- [ ] Professional users
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Design tools used (if any)**
- [ ] Figma
- [ ] Adobe XD
- [ ] Sketch
- [ ] InVision
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help illustrate the design issue or improvement.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the design improvement here.

**Priority level**
- [ ] Critical (major design flaw)
- [ ] High (significant improvement)
- [ ] Medium (moderate enhancement)
- [ ] Low (minor refinement)

**Note**: Design improvements enhance user experience and visual appeal!

**Note**: Good design is both beautiful and functional!

**Note**: Consider accessibility and usability in design decisions!

**Note**: Design should be consistent across all platforms and devices!
